nlq: what is the biggest city in wyoming
pred: SELECT city_name FROM city WHERE state_name = 'Wyoming' ORDER BY population DESC LIMIT 1
gold: SELECT city_name FROM city WHERE population  =  ( SELECT MAX ( population ) FROM city WHERE state_name  =  "wyoming" ) AND state_name  =  "wyoming";

nlq: where is the most populated area of wyoming
pred: SELECT c.city_name, MAX(c.population) as max_population FROM city c JOIN state s ON c.state_name = s.state_name WHERE s.state_name = 'Wyoming' GROUP BY c.city_name ORDER BY max_population DESC LIMIT 1
